auto-lock.heading: Auto-lock
auto-lock.description: Phylax locks automatically after this period of inactivity. The master key is wiped from memory and you have to re-enter your password.

export.heading: Export profile
export.description: Download your profile as a Markdown file. Bring it printed or as a file to your next doctor's visit.

danger-zone.heading: Danger zone
danger-zone.description: Permanently delete all Phylax data stored locally on this device. Profiles, observations, lab values, documents, AI configuration. No recovery path.
